Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}After a battle is won, {f 0 1 2}Shuffle Time{f 0 1 27} may occur.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}During Shuffle Time, different types of cards formed by the possibilities within your soul will appear. You can choose one of these cards.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 11}Each type of card has a different effect.[n]{f 0 1 2}Persona{f 0 1 27}: Acquire a new Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 12}{f 0 1 2}Wand{f 0 1 27}: Increases experience.[n]{f 0 1 2}Cup{f 0 1 27}: Activates battle support effects.[n]{f 0 1 2}Sword{f 0 1 27}: Obtain a Skill Card.[n]{f 0 1 2}Coin{f 0 1 27}: Obtain money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The more 1 Mores you get in battle, the higher the chance Shuffle Time will occur. If you end a battle with an All-Out Attack, Shuffle Time will always occur.[n]{f 1 1}
